doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents a non-existent policy memo that misrepresents current Florida law by falsely claiming LFO requirements have been waived, cites an unverifiable reference number and fabricated federal-court guidance, and describes policy
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains multiple hallmarks of a fabricated institutional memo: it misrepresents current Florida law (§98.0751 LFO requirements have not been waived by any such memo), cites an unverifiable "FL DoE 2025-EC-07" reference number, invents "post-2023 federal-district-court guidance on practical-impossibility of LFO-tracking" that does not exist as described, and the policy changes described — automatic eligibility regardless of unpaid LFOs and a prohibition on registrars asking about LFO status — contradict Florida's standing statutory framework and have no verifiable basis in official Division of Elections records.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document invents a non-existent policy memo that misrepresents current Florida law by falsely claiming LFO requirements have been waived, cites an unverifiable reference number and fabricated federal-court guidance, and describes policy changes that have no basis in any verifiable Division of Elections records.
